summary.en: <One-sentence board description for IDE list view and AI context, e.g. T5AI evaluation board with audio codec, RGB display, and dual-mic AEC>
summary.zh-CN: <一句话板子简介，用于 IDE 列表展示与 AI 上下文，例如：搭载音频编解码器、RGB 显示屏和双麦 AEC 的 T5AI 评估板>

variantId: <id field from variants[] in platforms/<platformId>.json, e.g. t5ai | esp32-s3 | esp32-c3>

audio.optional: <boolean: false = soldered onboard | true = via connector, not always installed>

note.en: <e.g. Audio codec with AEC (echo cancellation) enabled by default>
note.zh-CN: <e.g. 默认启用音频编解码器与 AEC 回声消除>

display.model: <driver IC: SSD1306 | ST7789 | ST7735S | ST7796S | GC9A01 | GC9D01 | ILI9341 | ILI9488 | ST7701S | ST7701SN | NV3041 | CO5300 | ST7305 | ST7306 | UC8276 | null>

note.zh-CN: <e.g. 2.4 寸 IPS 彩屏，支持 LVGL 双缓冲>

touch.model: <controller IC: GT911 | GT1151 | FT6336 | CST816X | CST92XX | null>

note.en: <e.g. Capacitive touch, up to 5 points; I2C address 0x5D>
note.zh-CN: <e.g. 电容式触控，最多 5 点；I2C 地址 0x5D>

note.en: <e.g. Optional camera — enable via TUYA_T5AI_BOARD_CAMERA in Kconfig>
note.zh-CN: <e.g. 可选摄像头，通过 Kconfig TUYA_T5AI_BOARD_CAMERA 启用>
<e.g. 6 轴加速度计 + 陀螺仪，默认 I2C 地址 0x68>

note.en: <e.g. 3 user buttons mapped to ENABLE_BUTTON / ENABLE_BUTTON_2 / ENABLE_BUTTON_3>
note.zh-CN: <e.g. 3 颗用户按键，对应 ENABLE_BUTTON / ENABLE_BUTTON_2 / ENABLE_BUTTON_3>

led-pixel.model: <IC model: WS2812 | WS2812B | SM16703P | YX1903B | null>

note.en: <e.g. 8x RGB addressable LEDs in a matrix; SPI-driven — timing is strict>
note.zh-CN: <e.g. 8 颗 RGB 可寻址灯珠矩阵，SPI 驱动，时序严格>

note.en: <e.g. Rotary encoder with push button; GPIO pins configured via DECODER_INPUT_A/B/P in Kconfig>
note.zh-CN: <e.g. 旋转编码器含按压功能，GPIO 引脚通过 Kconfig DECODER_INPUT_A/B/P 配置>

note.en: <e.g. IR transceiver; supports NEC and timecode protocols>
note.zh-CN: <e.g. 红外收发器，支持 NEC 与 timecode 协议>

note.en: <e.g. Analog joystick with push button; X/Y axes via ADC, button via GPIO>
note.zh-CN: <e.g. 模拟摇杆含按键，X/Y 轴通过 ADC 读取，按键通过 GPIO>

note.en: <e.g. PMIC for battery charging and power-rail control; must init before peripherals>
note.zh-CN: <e.g. 电源管理芯片，负责电池充电与电源域控制，需在外设初始化前完成>

printer.interface: <UART — for DP48A/ESC-POS | SPI+PWM+GPIO — for MTP02 bit-bang mechanism>

note.en: <e.g. Thermal printer; supports text and 1-bit monochrome bitmap printing>
note.zh-CN: <e.g. 热敏打印机，支持文本与单色位图打印>

tags: <wifi | ble | zigbee | thread | edge-ai | audio | display | camera | imu | led-pixel | pmic | cellular | ...>
